blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 3 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for metrics.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for metrics.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of metrics for ROAS, CAC, and payback period, but there is no evidence provided that confirms these metrics are being tracked or reported. The linked use case specifies the need for these metrics, yet the evidence does not include any information or data regarding their existence or retrieval. Therefore, the validation is blocked due to insufficient evidence.
